content.boundary: Bounded to describing passive drift and its distributional consequences under current rules; does not propose any change to identification, finance, capacity, or sorting mechanisms
content.change_lever: None — this is a deliberate non-intervention that uses continued monitoring of existing trends as an analytic device rather than a policy change
content.name: Passive baseline: no new SEN policy, observe demographic and system drift
content.system_problem: Current identification, gatekeeping, finance, and placement rules are already producing rising SNI/BTMN counts, workforce shortages, and county-level disparities; without an explicit baseline, any future intervention cannot be evaluated against what would have happened anyway
